textByHash.e3f22f6b71d7f2289a43fbbc96fb944fae91530b: He will be here soon. The Burgher trusts Him. That's good enough for me.
textByHash.45ca86c49b5d1eb9a0a5c1c21d958db89e1e4935: She will be here soon. The Burgher trusts Him. That's good enough for me.
textByHash.30882ccfdf0a67a6ddf12c2ca740bdb122b6cd07: He will be here soon. The Burgher trusts Her. That's good enough for me.
textByHash.4841efe8560d1940769a1690f8e6b605df611430: She will be here soon. The Burgher trusts Her. That's good enough for me.
textByHash.f10d2274cdb113dc94ccbeb12bd63de1990d5524: Sir, Champion has arrived! I knew He wouldn't let us down!
textByHash.e2165d2ff1422ac62294ff2235848aebb45993b5: Sir, Champion has arrived! I knew She wouldn't let us down!
textByHash.9172e69d30fa44ae342af14e4f03f330fa5e4111: A little bruised but nothing a true Fremennik can't handle!
textByHash.ec5d33a70478a77f4c9cec01cf8c50fda88429c1: Yes madam! I have some supplies with me if you need them, but I only have a small amount left. We took a heavy toll getting here.
textByHash.e94e695e3233f30a81acd3b5cc70b2a2bf47d372: Thank you madam. We have food, Strength potions and Prayer potions to see us through this battle.
textByHash.548a1381b09bb5530a3df7773616a6452fdd418d: A fine tale we will tell once you have claimed the beast's head.
textByHash.65b74d8c536b438caa01801ddbddd2c7f508ae7c: What do you need, brave , madam?
textByHash.cb02358e665f25ab2ca47eb26bb4055d59459821: Here, take this tuna quickly, madam!
textByHash.908edd284dd902fb5ddfc9e54b212400011a20e1: May the gods be with you !
textByHash.ca0882f856d1c64d549e31fb35f4fed1685c7ffc: I've run out of supplies! Only our bravery remains.
